content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: header_spoof_auth_bypass ⇒ Attacker_can_spoof_x-user-id_header_to_gain_access
P: strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') → prefer(session_userId)
V: ensure_userId_comes_from_session_if_header_is_missing ∧ test_authorization_failure_on_invalid_x-user-id
R: ! unauthorized_access_to_protected_resources ∧ ! possible_account_compromise
A: always_validate_user_identity

[AUDIT]
Check authorization mechanisms for header reliance.

structured_data.audit: Check authorization mechanisms for header reliance.
